interface.longDescription:
AutoTrader – Canada’s Most Trusted Marketplace to Buy and Sell Cars, Trucks, Boats & More!

Looking to buy or sell a vehicle in Canada? With AutoTrader, you get access to the largest inventory of new and used cars nationwide — from Fords and Toyotas to motorcycles, boats, and RVs. Trusted by over 5 million Canadians, our app delivers transparent pricing, expert reviews, and smart tools to help you get the best deal.

With AutoTrader, we provide you with the tools and information you need to make an informed choice. Shop with confidence!

Largest Inventory in Canada
AutoTrader gives you access to over 300,000 new and used vehicles from private sellers and car dealerships across Canada. Whether you're searching for a used car, new SUV, RV, boat, or motorcycle, you’ll find it here – and easily shop listings from both private sellers and dealerships.
defaultPrompt: Find reliable family cars around Toronto
